name: Viking 7B
archDisplay: Dense transformer, LLaMA-style + RoPE + FlashAttention, standard multi-head attention (32 layers, d_model 4096, 32 heads)
note: First open LLM covering all Nordic languages plus English and code; base checkpoint of the 7B/13B/33B Viking family trained on LUMI.

results.notes: TurkuNLP FIN-bench overall average, 3-shot, from Finnish-NLP's Ahma-7B model-card comparison table (an independent third-party evaluation of LumiOpen/Viking-7B, not self-reported by Silo AI/LumiOpen). The same table also reports a 0-shot overall average of 36.50 for Viking-7B; 3-shot chosen as the more commonly-cited headline figure.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via HF model card (7.55B params, 32 layers, d_model 4096, RoPE+FlashAttention, Apache-2.0, 4096 seq length, Finnish/English/Swedish/Danish/Norwegian/Icelandic+code, 2T training tokens) and tech.eu article (release date 2024-05-15). CORRECTED: the original record's architecture claim of "grouped-query attention" is false — fetched the model's config.json directly and found num_attention_heads == num_key_value_heads == 32, i.e. standard multi-head attention, not GQA. archDisplay updated accordingly; no other changes.
